item.text: The change is narrowly about session-scoped task resumption. I’m now checking whether the new filter is applied consistently across foreground/background flows and whether legacy or explicit-resume paths can bypass or be over-restricted by it.

item.text: The implementation and its state-writing path are consistent: foreground and detached tasks retain the originating session ID, the new resume lookup excludes its own in-flight job, and the no-session CLI behavior remains unchanged. Static syntax and whitespace checks also pass; I’m doing one final pass over edge statuses and documentation contracts before reporting.
